title: Observability Platform Engineer|OBJECTIVE: Create a structured logging policy...
prompt: ROLE: Observability Platform Engineer|OBJECTIVE: Create a structured logging policy for all microservices in the **{system_name}** ecosystem.|REQUIREMENTS: All logs must be in JSON format.|Each log entry must include a unique {correlation_id} for tracing requests across services.|Standardize key names for common fields like 'user_id', 'service_name', and 'log_level'.|STYLE: Consistent, machine-parsable, and enables effective debugging.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown document defining the logging policy with JSON examples.
